items.title: Nvidia, Apple Were Not Among October's Top 3 Dow Stocks
items.description: Dow stocks overall rose 2.5% in October. It was the index's best month since August and extended a win streak to six straight months.

items.title: IBM Layoffs Take Place As Tech Giant Cuts Thousands And Joins The AI Race
AMD Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Fall
items.description: Advanced Micro Devices' Q3 revenues jump 35.6% year over year, powered by booming Data Center demand and strong Client and Gaming growth.

items.title: IBM’s CEO admits Gen Z’s hiring nightmare is real—but after promising to hire more grads, he’s laying off thousands of workers
items.description: IBM’s CEO Arvind Krishna promised Gen Z he would hire more college grads and be the “opposite” of companies like Amazon laying off workers. Days later, he's giving thousands the pink slip.

items.title: IBM to lay off thousands as attention shifts to software
items.description: The company said it plans to trim its global workforce in its fourth quarter, citing a routine rebalancing.
